description_long: This object is a pair of long-handled bypass loppers, commonly used for pruning branches in gardens and urban green spaces. The handles are elongated, cylindrical, and primarily black with orange accents and textured grips for comfort and control. The cutting head features a curved, sharp steel blade and a counter blade, designed for cleanly slicing through woody stems. The pivot mechanism is robust and positioned near the blades, allowing for significant leverage and efficient cutting action. The handles appear to be made of lightweight metal or reinforced composite, with rubberized sections for improved grip. The brand 'FISKARS' is clearly visible on one handle, indicating a reputable manufacturer known for quality garden tools.
description: A pair of long-handled, black and orange bypass loppers with curved steel blades and textured grips, branded 'FISKARS'. Designed for pruning branches, it features ergonomic handles and a robust pivot mechanism.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the loppers, with both handles and the curved cutting blades clearly visible, as well as the 'FISKARS' branding.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular cross-section of the handles and the alignment of the blades, with minimal detail visible except the handle ends.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the full profile of the handles and blades, but without visible branding.
description_view_3: Direct top-down view showing the parallel alignment of the handles and the compact profile of the cutting head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, elongated handles with ergonomic, rubberized grips and orange end caps.
attribute_jaw_design: Curved bypass blades with a sharp cutting edge and a counter blade for clean slicing; no serrations or wire cutter features.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed, single-pivot mechanism near the blades, providing strong leverage but no adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Textured, ribbed rubber grip pattern on the handles for enhanced control and comfort.
